name: Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
2. In another bowl, combine the oil, egg, and milk together and whisk until well mixed.
3. Gradually stir the wet mixture into the dry mixture until just combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch square pan.
5. Bake in a hot oven (400°F) for 25 minutes.
